description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a light wood grain finish on the top, sides, and legs, and smooth, matte-finished doors and drawer fronts in a pale gray or off-white color. The front face includes two side doors and a central drawer, with a horizontal open shelf above the drawer, suitable for media devices or decor. The cabinet stands on four angled legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic and elevating it off the ground. The doors and drawer have small, square cutouts as finger pulls, maintaining a clean, handle-free appearance. The side panels and top display a continuous wood grain pattern, while the back is not visible. This piece is suitable for use as a TV stand, media console, or general storage in urban living rooms, offices, or lobbies.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with wood grain top and sides, pale gray doors, and angled legs. Features two doors, a central drawer, and an open shelf for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing a seamless, flat panel with no visible handles or openings, emphasizing the minimalist design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet, with angled legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear-front view revealing two side doors, a central drawer, and an open shelf above the drawer, with small square cutouts as pulls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain side panel and angled legs.
